path.style: fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-linecap: square; stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 9px;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-linecap: square; stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 9px;

rect.style: fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-linecap: square; stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width: 9px;
